test_cases.name: GitHub Actions Python依赖冲突导致构建失败

input.pipeline_log:
[2024-10-15 14:32:01] Run pip install -r requirements.txt
Collecting numpy==1.24.0
  Downloading numpy-1.24.0-cp310-cp310-manylinux_2_17_x86_64.whl (17.3 MB)
Collecting pandas==2.1.0
  Downloading pandas-2.1.0-cp310-cp310-manylinux_2_17_x86_64.whl (12.3 MB)
ERROR: Cannot install numpy==1.24.0 and pandas==2.1.0 because these package versions have conflicting dependencies.
ERROR: ResolutionImpossible: for help visit https://pip.pypa.io/en/latest/topics/dependency-resolution/

validation_rules: 必须精确指出冲突包及版本范围
修复方案需区分临时pin版本与长期锁定策略
禁止输出未经确认的强制安装命令

test_cases.name: GitLab CI Docker构建超时与缓存失效

input.pipeline_log:
[Stage: build-docker] Step 12/18 : RUN npm run build
> project@1.0.0 build
> vue-cli-service build
\  Building for production...node:internal/modules/cjs/loader:1050
  throw err;
  ^
Error: Cannot find module 'webpack'
Require stack: ... /builds/frontend/node_modules/.cache/babel-loader
FATAL: Job timeout exceeded after 1h 30m (3600s)

validation_rules: 需分析超时与缓存失效的关联性
回滚指令必须包含 git revert / docker tag 占位
预防清单需包含缓存策略与超时阈值调整建议
